ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders CASE DISMISSED. The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)
